$comment: Single source of truth for the action schema emitted by Claude during a call. Python (prompts.py, db.py, voice pipeline) loads this with json.load(). Dashboard (React) imports it directly: `import schema from '../../../shared/actions.json'`. Do NOT add types or fields without coordinating both sides.

envelope.$comment: What the dashboard receives over the WebSocket. Claude emits {type, payload}; the server adds id, call_sid, ts before fan-out.
envelope.type: one of the keys in `types` below
envelope.payload: object matching the payload shape for that type

claude_emits.$comment: The exact shape Claude must produce inside its <actions>...</actions> block — a JSON array of these objects. Zero or more per turn. The server wraps each one in an envelope.

room_request.purpose: A specific room, suite, or in-room setup the guest asked for this stay.

payload.request: corner suite with oak tree view
payload.source_quote: Could we get the same suite we had last time?

dining_request.purpose: Restaurant reservation, dietary need, or in-room dining the guest mentioned.

payload.request: vegetarian tasting menu at Madera, quiet table
payload.source_quote: We'd love somewhere quiet — my wife is vegetarian.

preference_note.purpose: A standing preference to attach to the guest profile (room temp, pillow, beverage, etc). Not an action staff must take this stay — a fact to remember.

payload.source_quote: I always like the room a little cool.

anticipatory_offer.purpose: The single offer surfaced this call. Recall + bridge + soft proposal. Maximum one per call. The dashboard should highlight this distinctly — it is the headline event.

payload.recall: Engagement weekend Sept 2023, corner suite with oak tree view
payload.bridge: Chef Marie on duty tonight; known for quiet anniversary surprises
payload.proposal: Would you like Chef Marie to put something together, kept off the bill?

flag_for_staff.purpose: Anything staff should know that doesn't fit the other types — concerns, unusual context, follow-ups, things the agent promised to confirm later.

payload.note: Guest asked whether spa is open at 23:00; agent deferred to staff confirmation.
payload.source_quote: Is the spa still open when we land?
